Class BaseSubtotalBuilder<T extends BaseSubtotalBuilder<T,U>, U>

java.lang.Object
ch.unibas.medizin.dynamicreports.report.builder.AbstractBuilder<T, DRSubtotal<U>>
ch.unibas.medizin.dynamicreports.report.builder.subtotal.BaseSubtotalBuilder<T,U>
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
Direct Known Subclasses:
PercentageSubtotalBuilder, SubtotalBuilder
public abstract class BaseSubtotalBuilder<T extends BaseSubtotalBuilder<T,U>, U> extends AbstractBuilder<T, DRSubtotal<U>>

Abstract BaseSubtotalBuilder class.

Author:
Ricardo Mariaca
